name: collection_page_6_collections_shop

observed_strengths.observation: Canonical collection page at /collections/shop — this is the authoritative URL that /collections/all redirects to; has the same strong product family organization (Coffee, Original, Matcha, Turmeric H2s) and matching meta description
Strawberry Matcha featured as 'NEW' in H3 — limited-edition product launch integrated into the main shop collection, creating urgency and novelty signals for returning visitors

missing_or_weak.observation: Both collection pages (collections/all and collections/shop) render identical content — only one unique collection was effectively crawled; the Calm/Rest/Protein sub-collections may have their own pages with better benefit targeting that were not sampled
H1 'Shop' — same generic heading issue as /collections/all; both canonical and redirect pages have the same weak H1 for collection-level SEO

purchase_path_notes: Evidence gap: collections/all and collections/shop are functionally identical. The distinct sub-collections (Energy, Calm, Protein) likely have better benefit-specific landing pages that were not crawled within the 12-page cap.
